steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is “The question of what cross-cultural traits distinguish these distinct modes, and secondarily what pressures led humans to develop them in the first place”—a singular noun phrase with “question” as the head noun.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Animates is the singular present-tense form that agrees with a singular subject. The other options fail: “have animated” is plural, “animate” lacks singular marking, and “animating” is a participle, not a finite verb. That matches choice A — A is correct.
